text: Party A shall pay Party B the sum of 10,000,000 VND on or before 01/01/2024.
Party B shall pay the full rental amount before the 5th of each month.
The Employer shall transfer 5,000,000 VND to the Employee by 15/06/2024.
Party A agrees to pay Party B a monthly fee of 2,000,000 VND.
The Lessor shall receive the security deposit of 20,000,000 VND from the Lessee within 7 days of signing.
Party A shall deliver the goods to Party B no later than 30/09/2024.
The Employee shall receive a monthly salary of 15,000,000 VND from the Employer.
Party B shall reimburse Party A for all expenses not exceeding 3,000,000 VND.
The Contractor shall complete the project by 31/12/2024 and submit the final report to the Client.
Party A shall pay an advance of 50,000,000 VND on the effective date.
If payment is delayed, a penalty of 1% per day shall apply.
Late payments shall incur an interest rate of 0.05% per day on the outstanding balance.
Party B shall be subject to a penalty of 5,000,000 VND for each day of delay.
The penalty rate for early termination is 10% of the total contract value.
A late fee of 2% per month will be charged on overdue amounts.
Party A shall pay liquidated damages equal to 15% of the contract price.
If Party B terminates the contract early, a penalty of 3,000,000 VND shall be imposed.
The interest rate applicable shall be 8% per annum as specified in the agreement.
Any breach by the Contractor shall result in liquidated damages of 10,000,000 VND.
Overdue invoices will attract a surcharge of 1.5% per month.
A penalty of 0.1% per day shall be imposed on overdue payments.
The default interest rate shall not exceed 20% per annum.
Party A shall pay a penalty fee of 2,000,000 VND for each week of delay.
This agreement is governed by the Civil Code 2015 of Vietnam.
The parties agree to comply with the Labor Code 2019 in all employment matters.
Disputes shall be resolved in accordance with Article 45 of Decree No. 15/2015/ND-CP.
This contract shall be interpreted pursuant to the Commercial Law 2005.
Party A warrants compliance with Circular 09/2015/TT-NHNN issued by the State Bank.
The Employer agrees to adhere to the provisions of the Law on Enterprises 2020.
All tax obligations shall be fulfilled pursuant to the Tax Administration Law 2019.
The confidentiality clause is governed by Article 17 of the Intellectual Property Law.
Party B must comply with Decree No. 98/2020/ND-CP on penalties for commercial violations.
The arbitration procedure shall follow the Law on Commercial Arbitration 2010.
Liability shall be limited as provided under Article 302 of the Commercial Law 2005.
Party A must register the contract under Decree No. 163/2006/ND-CP.
This contract is effective from 01/03/2024 and expires on 28/02/2025.
Payment must be received within 30 days of invoice.
The probationary period shall last 60 days from the date of joining.
Party A shall submit the report no later than the 10th business day of each quarter.
The lease term commences on 01/01/2024 and terminates on 31/12/2026.
The notice period for termination is 30 days prior to the intended termination date.
Party B must renew the contract before the expiry date of 30/06/2025.
Deliverables are due on the last working day of each calendar month.
Party A shall provide written notice at least 15 days before the termination date.
The warranty period is 12 months from the date of acceptance.
The total contract value is 500,000,000 VND.
Party A shall provide a security deposit of USD 2,000 upon signing.
The monthly retainer fee is 8,000,000 VND payable in advance.
Party B shall pay a refundable deposit of 10,000,000 VND.
The service fee of 1,200,000 VND per month shall be paid by Party A to Party B.
The Lessor shall refund 20,000,000 VND to the Lessee within 15 days of contract termination.
The Borrower shall repay the Lender the principal of 100,000,000 VND.
Party A shall provide a performance bond of 50,000,000 VND to Party B.
The Seller agrees to transfer ownership to the Buyer upon receipt of full payment.
The Service Provider shall assign a dedicated team to the Client for the duration of the project.
Party A, hereinafter referred to as the Licensor, grants Party B the right to use the software.
The Franchisor shall provide training and support to the Franchisee within 30 days.
Party A shall pay Party B 25,000,000 VND by 15/03/2024, failing which a penalty rate of 2% per month shall apply.
The Employer shall pay the Employee a monthly salary of 12,000,000 VND in accordance with the Labor Code 2019.
Any breach of this agreement by Party B shall incur a penalty of 50,000,000 VND as stipulated in Article 12 of the Civil Code 2015.
The interest rate is set at 9% per annum pursuant to Circular 39/2016/TT-NHNN.
Party B shall indemnify Party A for any losses not exceeding 200,000,000 VND within 30 days of the claim.
The Contractor must complete all work by 31/03/2025 or face a penalty of 1% per week of the contract value.
The Lessee shall pay the Lessor 6,000,000 VND per month for the lease of the premises.
Party A must notify Party B in writing at least 60 days before the expiry date of 01/06/2025.
Under the Enterprise Income Tax Law 2008, Party A shall withhold 10% of the payment.
The Buyer shall pay the Seller USD 10,000 within 14 days of delivery.
All disputes shall be settled by arbitration in accordance with the Law on Commercial Arbitration 2010 within 60 days.
Party B shall pay a late charge equal to 0.03% per day on any overdue amounts.
The Service Provider shall complete the implementation phase by 30/11/2024 for the Client.
The Employer shall pay the Employee an annual bonus of 2 months salary no later than 31/01 of each year.
Party A shall pay Party B a maintenance fee of 3,500,000 VND per quarter starting from 01/04/2024.
The Seller warrants that all goods comply with the Law on Product Quality 2007.
Party B shall pay interest at a rate of 12% per annum on overdue amounts.
The Client shall pay the Service Provider 15,000,000 VND upon completion of each milestone.
The Employer agrees to pay the Employee a monthly salary of 5,000,000 VND starting from March 1, 2024.
ABC Corporation shall deliver the goods to XYZ Limited no later than June 30, 2025, failing which a penalty of 2,000,000 VND per day of delay shall apply.
This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with Vietnamese law.
The Borrower shall repay the Lender the principal amount of $50,000 with an annual interest rate of 8% per annum by December 31, 2026.
Seller warrants that title to all goods passes to Buyer free and clear of any encumbrances upon receipt of full payment of 20,000,000 VND.
Should Tenant fail to pay rent by the 5th of each month, Landlord shall be entitled to impose a late payment penalty of 500,000 VND per occurrence.
Pursuant to the Civil Code 2015, all disputes arising from this contract shall be resolved by arbitration.
The Service Provider shall complete the project by September 15, 2025, and any delay shall incur a penalty equal to 1% of the total contract value per week.
GlobalTech Inc. agrees to license its software to DataSoft Vietnam for a licensing fee of $120,000 payable on January 1, 2025.
The Contractor shall maintain professional indemnity insurance of at least 500,000,000 VND throughout the term of this Agreement, as required under Decree No. 15/2021/ND-CP.
Pursuant to Article 35 of the Labor Code 2019, the Employee shall receive severance pay equivalent to one month's salary for each year of service.
Vendor shall invoice Client monthly at a rate of 3.5% of total project costs, not to exceed $200,000 per quarter.
The Franchisor grants Franchisee a non-exclusive license to operate under the brand name for five years commencing April 1, 2024.
Should Consultant breach any confidentiality obligation, Client may seek liquidated damages of $75,000 as a penalty for unauthorized disclosure of proprietary information.
Licensor and Licensee agree that royalty payments shall accrue at a rate of 12% of net revenues, payable quarterly beginning July 1, 2024.
This contract is subject to and interpreted under the Law on Enterprises 2020 of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam.
The Principal shall remit 15,000,000 VND to the Agent within 30 days of invoice receipt, referencing the signed document dated February 28, 2025.
Distributor shall purchase a minimum of 1,000 units at 200,000 VND per unit from Manufacturer each calendar quarter.
The penalty for early termination by either Party A or Party B shall be equivalent to three months' service fees, not less than 30,000,000 VND.
Insurer agrees to provide coverage to Insured up to a maximum of $1,000,000 per claim, effective from 01/06/2025 to 31/05/2026.
All payments under this Agreement shall bear interest at 6.5% per annum in accordance with the provisions of the Civil Code 2015.
Tenant shall deposit 3,000,000 VND as a security deposit with Landlord prior to taking possession on March 15, 2024.
The penalty clause stipulates that Supplier shall pay Buyer 0.1% of the undelivered goods value per day of delay, up to a maximum of 8% of the total contract value.
Employer shall contribute 20,000,000 VND annually to the Employee's pension fund, as mandated by the Social Insurance Law 2014.
The Joint Venture between Alpha Holdings and Beta Ventures shall commence on 01/07/2024 and terminate on 30/06/2029.

Subcontractor shall be subject to a delay penalty of 500,000 VND for each calendar day beyond the agreed completion date of November 30, 2024, constituting a penalty for failure to meet delivery milestones.
The interest rate applicable to overdue invoices shall be 9% per annum as specified under the Commercial Law 2005.
Buyer shall wire transfer $300,000 to Seller's designated account no later than three business days after execution of this Agreement on 05/05/2025.
The lessor, Nguyen Van An, shall receive rental payments of 8,000,000 VND per month from the lessee, Tran Thi Bich, starting 01/01/2025.
Failure by Borrower to repay the loan by its maturity date of August 15, 2027 shall result in a penalty interest charge of 15% per annum on all outstanding balances.
This Memorandum of Understanding between TechVision Co. and SmartBuild Ltd. is governed by the laws of Vietnam and entered into on 10/10/2024.
The Employee's base salary shall be 12,000,000 VND per month, subject to an annual increment of 5% provided performance targets are met.
Developer shall deliver the software prototype to Client by March 31, 2025, with a penalty of 10,000,000 VND for each month of delay beyond the due date.
In accordance with Circular 39/2016/TT-NHNN, the Lender shall not charge interest exceeding 20% per annum on any consumer loan.
Consignor authorizes Consignee to sell goods on its behalf and shall receive 70% of the proceeds, with the remaining 30% retained by Consignee as a commission fee.
Any breach of the non-compete clause by the Employee shall constitute a penalty obligating payment of 50,000,000 VND to the Employer within 30 days of the breach.
Sigma Tech Solutions and Omega Digital agree to split net profits equally, each receiving 50%, subject to annual review beginning December 1, 2024.
The escrow amount of 100,000,000 VND held by the Escrow Agent shall be released to Seller upon satisfaction of all conditions precedent by 01/03/2025.
Pursuant to the Investment Law 2020, the Foreign Investor shall not repatriate capital until the project has operated for a minimum period of three years.
The management fee payable by Fund Manager to Administrator shall be 0.5% of net asset value, calculated monthly and payable by the 15th of each month.
If Seller fails to deliver the contracted quantity by July 15, 2025, Buyer shall be entitled to a penalty of $10,000 per day of delay until full delivery is made.
The Guarantor unconditionally guarantees payment of all amounts owed by Obligor to Creditor, up to a maximum of 200,000,000 VND, under the terms of the Civil Code 2015.
Licensee shall pay Licensor a one-time upfront fee of $25,000 on the Effective Date of May 1, 2025, and thereafter a recurring fee at a rate of 4% of monthly gross revenue.
Green Energy Ltd. shall supply electricity to Industrial Park JSC at a tariff of 1,800 VND per kWh from 01/01/2025 through 31/12/2027.
Pursuant to Resolution No. 326/2023/UBTVQH15, all penalty provisions in this Agreement shall be enforced in accordance with the dispute resolution mechanisms therein.
The Assignor hereby assigns all rights and obligations under this contract to Assignee, effective 15/08/2025, for a consideration of 5,000,000 VND.
Prime Contractor shall impose a back-charge penalty on Subcontractor equal to 150% of the remediation costs if defects are not rectified within 14 days of written notice.
The Parties, namely Vietnam State Bank and Agribank, agree that any overdue debt shall accrue default interest at 10% per annum as prescribed by Decree 21/2021/ND-CP.

Owner shall pay Contractor the sum of 450,000,000 VND in three installments: 150,000,000 VND upon signing on 01/04/2025, 150,000,000 VND upon completion of Phase 1, and the final 150,000,000 VND upon project handover no later than 01/10/2026.
Party A acknowledges receipt of the deposit paid by Party A on behalf of Party B.
The arbitration fees shall be borne by Claimant and shall range from 5,000,000 VND to 50,000,000 VND depending on the claim value.
The warranty period commences on 01/01/2025 and expires on 31/12/2025, with an optional extension until 30/06/2026 upon written agreement between Vendor and Purchaser.
The spread payable by Debtor to Creditor shall be 250 basis points (2.5%) above the reference rate published by the State Bank of Vietnam on each reset date.

In the event of delayed delivery, Supplier shall pay Buyer a penalty as follows: 0.5% of the contract value for delays up to 7 days, and 1% per day thereafter, as a penalty for breach of delivery schedule.
This clause is drafted in compliance with Article 17, Clause 3 of the Law on Cybersecurity 2018, and Franchisor shall ensure full adherence.
The Seller shall receive fifty million Vietnamese Dong (50,000,000 VND) as full and final settlement from Buyer.
Interest shall accrue at a floating rate equal to LIBOR plus 3.5% per annum, payable by Borrower to Noteholder on each quarterly payment date.
The total aggregate penalty payable by Contractor to Owner shall not exceed 10% of the total contract price of 2,000,000,000 VND under any circumstances.
This Agreement is governed by the Civil Code 2015 and the Commercial Law 2005, and any unresolved disputes shall be referred to the Vietnam International Arbitration Centre.
Hanoi Infrastructure Investment Joint Stock Company (hereinafter "HIIJSC") shall pay Ho Chi Minh City Urban Development Corporation (hereinafter "HCUD") 80,000,000,000 VND by 30/09/2025.
Lender agrees to charge 0% interest for the first six months of the loan term to Borrower as a promotional concession.
Licensor may terminate this Agreement and claim a penalty of $500,000 from Licensee for any act of reverse engineering of the licensed software.
This Agreement shall be deemed effective retroactively from January 1, 2024, notwithstanding its execution date of March 10, 2025, between Alpha Corp and Beta Corp.
Jointly and severally, ABC Ltd., DEF Co., and GHI Inc. shall be liable to pay 15,000,000 VND to Plaintiff no later than 15/07/2025.

Should Lessor fail to maintain the premises in a habitable condition, Lessee shall be entitled, as a penalty remedy, to withhold up to 30% of the monthly rent of 10,000,000 VND until the defect is remedied.
The tax obligations of Taxpayer shall be calculated in accordance with Circular No. 80/2021/TT-BTC issued by the Ministry of Finance.
The total consideration is USD 200,000 (equivalent to approximately 5,000,000,000 VND at the prevailing exchange rate), payable by Investor to Target Company on the Closing Date of 01/12/2025.
Escrow Agent shall hold 100,000,000 VND in trust; upon successful completion, 100,000,000 VND shall be released to Beneficiary.
The variable interest rate charged by Bank to Corporate Borrower shall not fall below 4% nor exceed 12% per annum in any calculation period.
Obligor shall have a 10-day cure period; thereafter, a penalty of 0.05% of the outstanding amount per day shall accrue in favour of Obligee until full cure.
The fundamental rights of Employee are protected under the Constitution of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam 2013, and Employer shall not act in contravention thereof.
Service Provider shall deliver the final report no later than the last business day of Q3 2025 (i.e., September 30, 2025) to Client.
Developer shall pay Landowner 10,000,000,000 VND in four tranches: 25% on 01/03/2025, 25% on 01/06/2025, 25% on 01/09/2025, and the remaining 25% on 01/12/2025.
Pursuant to Article 300 of the Commercial Law 2005, the penalty for Seller's failure to deliver conforming goods shall not exceed 8% of the value of the non-conforming portion.
This Agreement shall automatically renew on January 1, 2026 for successive one-year terms unless either Party A or Party B provides 90 days' written notice of non-renewal.
Neither Contractor nor Employer shall be liable for penalties or damages exceeding 500,000,000 VND in the event of a force majeure event lasting more than 30 consecutive days.
Assignor transfers all intellectual property rights to Assignee for a lump-sum payment of $80,000 plus an ongoing royalty of 2% of annual net sales from the Effective Date of 01/01/2026.
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of Vietnam, specifically the Civil Code 2015, and the parties irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Hanoi.
Franchisee shall pay Franchisor a penalty of 20,000,000 VND for each instance of unauthorized use of the trademark, and a separate penalty of 50,000,000 VND for any disclosure of trade secrets.
As an incentive, Bank shall credit Depositor with a bonus rate of 0.25% per month on balances exceeding 100,000,000 VND maintained through December 31, 2025.
All procurement activities conducted by Procuring Entity shall comply with Decree No. 24/2024/ND-CP on public procurement, and any non-compliance shall render the contract void.
The aggregate liability of Service Provider to Client under this Agreement shall not exceed the total fees paid in the 12 months preceding the claim, capped at $1,500,000.
The final payment of 75,000,000 VND shall be due 30 days after the issuance of the Completion Certificate, which is expected no later than June 30, 2026.
Principal hereby instructs Agent to remit 200,000,000 VND collected from Sub-Agent to the Principal's designated account by the 10th of each calendar month.
Owner shall be entitled to withhold 5% of each progress payment as a retention sum, to be released to Contractor within 28 days of Final Completion, as a performance security penalty mechanism.

Overdue amounts shall bear interest at the rate prescribed under Article 357 of the Civil Code 2015, currently set at 10% per annum, until fully settled by Debtor.
The escrow deposit of $250,000 shall be released: (i) $100,000 to Seller on 01/06/2025 upon delivery; (ii) the remaining $150,000 to Seller on 01/09/2025 upon final acceptance.
Any public disparagement of Licensor's brand by Licensee shall constitute a material breach and result in a penalty of $200,000 for reputational harm, payable within 15 days of written demand.
In the event of conflict between the Law on Investment 2020 and the Law on Enterprises 2020, the provisions of the Law on Investment 2020 shall prevail with respect to Foreign Investor's rights.
Employee agrees that 10,000,000 VND of the monthly salary shall be deferred and placed in an interest-bearing account at 5% per annum, to be paid in full by Employer on December 31, 2025.
Willful misconduct by Contractor shall attract double the standard penalty, amounting to 60,000,000 VND as a penalty for aggravated breach, recoverable by Owner.
This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales, notwithstanding the location of business of Seller and Buyer in Vietnam.
Publisher shall pay Author a royalty of 8% of the cover price per copy sold, subject to a minimum annual guarantee of 50,000,000 VND regardless of actual sales.

In the event of a personal data breach caused by Processor, Processor shall pay Controller a penalty of 100,000,000 VND per affected data subject, up to an aggregate cap of 1,000,000,000 VND, as required under Decree 13/2023/ND-CP.
The parties agree that the liquidated damages of $30,000 represent a genuine pre-estimate of loss and shall not be construed as a penalty under the governing law, being the Civil Code 2015.
Agent shall earn a commission of 2% on sales up to $500,000, and 3.5% on any amount exceeding $500,000, payable by Principal on the last business day of each month.
For every day that Lessee fails to vacate the premises after expiry of the lease term on 31/03/2026, Lessor shall charge a holding-over penalty of 2,000,000 VND per day.

To the extent applicable, the parties shall comply with both the Anti-Money Laundering Law 2022 of Vietnam and the relevant FATF Recommendations, as acknowledged by Financial Institution and Customer.

Contractor shall achieve Structural Completion by August 31, 2025, and Practical Completion by February 28, 2026; failure to meet either milestone shall incur a delay penalty of 0.1% of the contract sum of 50,000,000,000 VND per day.

The One Member Limited Liability Company known as Viet Xanh Trading (hereinafter "Seller") shall transfer title of the asset to the Joint Stock Company known as Nam Phong Real Estate (hereinafter "Buyer") for 3,500,000,000 VND on 15/11/2025.
The discount rate granted by Supplier to Distributor shall be 5% for Year 1 (ending December 31, 2025), 7% for Year 2 (ending December 31, 2026), and 10% from Year 3 onwards.

Infringer shall pay Rights Holder a penalty of 300,000,000 VND for each infringing act, as a penalty for unauthorized reproduction, in addition to any injunctive relief available under the Law on Intellectual Property 2005 (as amended in 2022).
Seller shall be entitled to an earn-out payment of up to $5,000,000 from Buyer if the acquired business achieves EBITDA of at least $2,000,000 in the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026.
In the event of termination for convenience by Client, Client shall pay Service Provider a termination fee equal to 15% of the remaining contract value, as a penalty for early exit.
The transfer of land use rights from Transferor to Transferee shall be executed in compliance with the Land Law 2024 and notarized before a competent notary public.
Tenant shall pay Landlord monthly rent of 15,000,000 VND for the first two years, increasing to 18,000,000 VND per month from the third year of the lease commencing 01/05/2025.
Performance Bond Provider unconditionally guarantees, in favour of Employer, performance by Contractor; the bond amount is 10% of the contract price of 8,000,000,000 VND, valid until 01/01/2027.
During the period from 01/07/2025 to 31/07/2025, Operator shall pay Platform 500,000 VND per transaction processed, subject to a monthly cap of 100,000,000 VND.
Whereas Borrower was previously Lender under the Original Agreement dated March 1, 2023, the parties agree to novate all obligations effective April 1, 2025.
Should Operator fail to renew its operating license by June 30, 2025, it shall indemnify Investor against any regulatory penalty imposed under Decree No. 98/2020/ND-CP, up to 500,000,000 VND.
Unpaid invoices shall accrue compound interest at 1.5% per month, calculated on the last day of each month, until fully discharged by Debtor to Creditor.
JV Partner may earn a 40% participating interest in the project by contributing $3,000,000 by December 31, 2025 and a further $2,000,000 by December 31, 2026.

Any violation of anti-bribery obligations by Representative shall be treated as a gross misconduct penalty event, entitling Principal to terminate and claim damages of 1,000,000,000 VND under the Anti-Corruption Law 2018.
The Consortium comprising Firm A, Firm B, and Firm C shall submit a joint bid and, if awarded, shall execute the works for 120,000,000,000 VND by December 31, 2027.
Counterparty shall pay Beneficiary EUR 45,000 as a breakup fee if the proposed merger is not consummated by March 31, 2026.
The penalty rates set out in Schedule 3 of this Agreement shall apply to Supplier's delay, with the maximum penalty not exceeding 5% of the annual contract value of 1,200,000,000 VND.
Guarantor A and Guarantor B jointly and severally guarantee all payment obligations of Principal Debtor up to 400,000,000 VND, in accordance with the Civil Code 2015.
Either Party A or Party B may terminate this Agreement immediately upon the occurrence of an insolvency event, with no penalty payable if termination occurs after January 1, 2026.
Employer grants Employee an option to purchase 10,000 shares at $2.50 per share, vesting equally over four years from the grant date of 01/01/2025.

Departing Employee shall not solicit any client of Employer for a period of 24 months after the termination date; breach shall incur a penalty of 200,000,000 VND as liquidated damages for non-solicitation violation.
Client shall advance 30,000,000 VND to Consultant on 01/04/2025; if the engagement is cancelled by Client within 60 days, 50% of the advance shall be returned as a clawback penalty.
Lessor shall charge Lessee a storage fee of 50,000 VND per pallet per day, commencing from the date of deposit on 15/01/2025.
Force majeure events as defined under Article 156 of the Civil Code 2015 shall excuse Contractor from penalty liability, provided written notice is given to Employer within 5 days of the event.
Shareholder A shall have the right to sell its shares to Shareholder B at a price of 50,000 VND per share (the "Put Price") exercisable between January 1, 2026 and June 30, 2026.

Contractor shall pay Owner: (a) a delay penalty of 0.2% per day for late completion; (b) a defect penalty of 100,000,000 VND per uncured defect; and (c) a termination penalty of 10% of the contract value for wrongful abandonment.
The Employment Contract shall comply with the Labor Code 2019 (as amended by Law No. 38/2019/QH14) and all regulations issued thereunder, binding on both Employer and Employee.
The deferred purchase price of 500,000,000 VND shall accrue interest at 7% per annum from the Signing Date of 01/09/2025 until paid in full by Buyer to Seller.
Each shareholder shall be jointly liable for the penalty of 1,000,000,000 VND in proportion to their ownership stake: Investor A at 60% and Investor B at 40%.
Employer shall pay Employee a performance bonus of 5,000,000 VND if monthly revenue targets exceed 500,000,000 VND for three consecutive months.

If Platform Operator fails to maintain 99.9% system uptime in any calendar month, it shall credit Client an amount equal to 10% of the monthly service fee of 20,000,000 VND as a service level penalty.
Unless extended by mutual written agreement, this Agreement shall automatically terminate on December 31, 2030, without any penalty to either Grantor or Grantee.
Should Employee voluntarily resign within 12 months of receiving the signing bonus of 30,000,000 VND paid on 01/03/2025, Employee shall repay Employer the full amount plus interest at 6% per annum.
If Distributor fails to purchase the minimum annual quota of 10,000,000,000 VND in any contract year, Distributor shall pay Supplier a shortfall penalty of 5% of the unfulfilled quota amount.
All amounts expressed in USD shall be converted to VND at the selling rate published by Vietcombank on the date of payment, in accordance with Ordinance on Foreign Exchange 2005.
Recipient shall procure an advance payment bank guarantee in the amount of 15% of the contract sum of 2,500,000,000 VND, valid from 01/06/2025 to 01/06/2026, in favour of Payor.

Any fraudulent misrepresentation by Counterparty shall expose it to civil penalties under the Civil Code 2015 and criminal liability under the Penal Code 2015 (amended 2017), recoverable by Aggrieved Party.
Purchaser deposits 500,000,000 VND with Seller as earnest money; if Purchaser defaults, the deposit shall be forfeited to Seller as a penalty for non-performance.

The Consortium Leader, being VN Build Corp, shall ensure compliance with Decree No. 15/2021/ND-CP on construction project management, and any non-compliance shall attract a 2% penalty on the project value of 300,000,000,000 VND.
Owner shall retain 3% of each certified payment as a defect holdback, to be released to Contractor no later than 12 months after the Defects Liability Certificate is issued, expected on 01/04/2027.

All payments from Obligor to Obligee shall be made free and clear of withholding tax; if any withholding is required by law at a rate of 5%, Obligor shall gross up such payment so that Obligee receives the full net amount.
Supplier warrants that the price of 500,000 VND per unit offered to Distributor is no less favourable than the price offered to any other distributor, effective from 01/07/2025.

Operator shall comply with the Law on Environmental Protection 2020; any violation resulting in environmental damage shall incur a penalty of 2,000,000,000 VND and mandatory remediation costs payable to the State.
Borrower may drawdown up to 10,000,000,000 VND from the revolving credit facility established by Lender, at an interest rate of 9.5% per annum, with the facility expiring on 31/12/2026.
Investor's equity stake shall increase from 20% to 35% if Founder fails to achieve revenue of $1,000,000 by June 30, 2026, acting as a dilution penalty for underperformance.

If the exchange rate between USD and VND moves by more than 15% from the rate prevailing on the Signing Date of 01/01/2025, either Seller or Buyer may invoke this hardship clause and request renegotiation.
Asset Manager shall submit quarterly reports to Fund no later than the 15th day after each quarter end; late submission shall incur a penalty of 10,000,000 VND per day of delay.

The formal validity of this Agreement shall be governed by Vietnamese law, while the substantive rights of Licensor and Licensee shall be governed by the Law on Intellectual Property 2005 (as amended in 2022).
In full and final settlement, Respondent shall pay Claimant 750,000,000 VND on or before 01/08/2025, whereupon both parties shall execute mutual releases and all penalty claims shall be extinguished.
The outstanding balance shall accrue interest at a rate of 8% per annum from the date of default until full settlement.
Late payment charges shall be applied at 1.5% per month on any unpaid invoice amount.
The annual escalation of the service fee shall not exceed 5% per year as agreed by both parties.
A discount of 10% shall be applied to the total contract value if payment is received within 7 days of invoice issuance.
The borrower agrees to repay the principal at an interest rate of 12% per annum, calculated on a daily basis.
Commission payable to the Agent shall be calculated at 3% of the gross sales revenue generated each quarter.
The withholding tax rate applicable under this agreement shall be 20% of the total remuneration paid.
Overdue invoices shall attract a penalty surcharge of 2% per month compounded monthly until fully discharged.
The profit-sharing ratio between the joint-venture partners shall be fixed at 60% and 40% respectively.
A value-added tax (VAT) of 10% shall be levied on all taxable supplies made under this contract.
The retention money shall amount to 5% of each progress payment and shall be released upon issuance of the final completion certificate.
Royalties shall be payable at a rate of 7% of net sales and shall be remitted quarterly within 30 days of each quarter-end.
The early repayment fee shall be equivalent to 3% of the outstanding loan principal at the time of prepayment.

The success fee shall be calculated as 2% of the first 5,000,000,000 VND of transaction value, plus 1.5% of any amount between 5,000,000,000 VND and 10,000,000,000 VND, and 1% of any excess above 10,000,000,000 VND.
Interest on the subordinated loan shall accrue at 11.5% per annum, compounding quarterly, with an effective annual yield of approximately 12.01%, as calculated in accordance with the Civil Code 2015.

The management fee shall be 0.75% per annum of the net asset value of the fund, payable monthly in arrears, together with a performance fee of 20% of returns exceeding the benchmark rate of 8% per annum.

Pursuant to Decree No. 65/2022/ND-CP, the bond yield shall not exceed 300 basis points above the government bond yield of equivalent maturity; the applicable cap as of the issuance date is approximately 12.5% per annum.

The royalty rate for sales in the domestic market shall be 6% of net revenues; for export sales the rate shall be reduced to 4% of net revenues, with both rates subject to annual review and adjustment by mutual consent.

Default interest shall be charged at a rate equal to one and a half (1.5) times the contract interest rate; if the contract interest rate is 8% per annum, the default rate shall therefore be 12% per annum.

The value-added tax rate applicable to the services under this Agreement is 10% in accordance with the Law on Value Added Tax 2008 as amended; input tax credits may be claimed by the Purchaser where eligible.

Annual salary increments shall not be less than 5% nor more than 15% of the preceding year's base salary, and shall be reviewed each year in March taking into account the Consumer Price Index increase.

The variable component of remuneration shall constitute no more than 30% of total annual compensation; the fixed component shall be not less than 70%, consistent with guidelines under the Labor Code 2019.

Processing fees shall be assessed at 0.5% of each disbursement, subject to a minimum fee of $500 and a maximum fee of $5,000, with an additional administrative surcharge of 0.1% applied to disbursements exceeding $1,000,000.

The discount rate applied to future cash flows for the purpose of computing present value under this Agreement shall be 9.25% per annum, reflecting the Parties' agreed weighted average cost of capital.

Pursuant to the Law on Credit Institutions 2024, the maximum short-term VND lending rate applicable to priority sectors shall not exceed 4% per annum, while the standard short-term rate cap is 5.5% per annum.

The Tenant shall pay a deposit equivalent to three (3) months' rent; such deposit shall earn interest at the demand deposit rate published by Vietcombank, currently 0.5% per annum, to be returned at lease expiry.
Late filing of reports shall attract a surcharge of 0.03% per day of the outstanding tax liability, not exceeding 10% of the total unpaid tax, in accordance with the Law on Tax Administration 2019.

The convertible note shall bear interest at 6% per annum; upon conversion the accrued interest shall be added to principal and converted at a 20% discount to the share price at the time of the qualified financing event.

Prepayment fees shall apply as follows: 3% of the outstanding principal if prepaid within the first year, 2% if prepaid in the second year, and 1% if prepaid in the third year; no fee applies thereafter.
The withholding tax rate on dividend payments to foreign investors is 5% under the current double taxation agreement between Vietnam and Singapore, or 10% in the absence of such treaty protection.

Interest on overdue trade payables shall accrue at the European Central Bank main refinancing rate plus 8 percentage points per annum; any such interest exceeding 20% per annum shall be automatically reduced to 20% per annum.
The Franchisor may increase the royalty fee by no more than the percentage increase in the Consumer Price Index plus 2% in any given year, subject to a maximum single-year increase of 7.5%.

Pursuant to Circular No. 39/2016/TT-NHNN on lending activities of credit institutions, the interest rate for medium-term loans shall not exceed the maximum rate prescribed by the State Bank of Vietnam, currently set at 9% per annum.

The Escrow Account shall earn interest at the prevailing three-month treasury bill rate, currently 4.75% per annum, which shall accrue to the account of the Seller upon successful completion of conditions precedent.
Carbon credit revenues shall be shared between the Landowner and the Project Developer at a ratio of 40% to 60% respectively for the first five years, adjusting to 45% to 55% thereafter.

The tiered interest structure provides for: (a) 7% per annum on balances up to $100,000; (b) 8.5% per annum on balances between $100,001 and $500,000; and (c) 10% per annum on balances exceeding $500,000.

In the event that the Contractor abandons the project prior to completion, the Contractor shall be liable to pay a penalty comprising: (i) forfeiture of the full performance bond; (ii) reimbursement of all documented remobilization costs; and (iii) liquidated damages equal to 15% of the total uncompleted contract value.

Should the Supplier deliver goods that fail to meet the agreed specifications on two or more occasions within any rolling twelve-month period, the Buyer shall be entitled to impose a cumulative quality penalty of 5% of the total annual purchase value, in addition to its right to terminate the Agreement for cause.

The Licensor may impose a penalty for unauthorized use of intellectual property equal to three (3) times the standard licensing fee that would have been payable, plus all legal costs and investigative expenses reasonably incurred, in accordance with the Law on Intellectual Property 2022.

For each day of delay beyond the agreed commissioning date of 30/06/2026, the EPC Contractor shall pay the Owner liquidated damages of 0.1% of the total EPC Contract Price per day, subject to a maximum aggregate cap of 10% of the total EPC Contract Price, beyond which the Owner may exercise its right of termination.

Failure by the Data Controller to implement the data security measures mandated under Decree No. 13/2023/ND-CP within the stipulated remediation period shall result in a contractual penalty of 200,000,000 VND per breach event, in addition to any administrative fines imposed by competent authorities.

Any breach of the confidentiality obligations set out in Article 7 shall entitle the non-breaching Party to claim a lump-sum penalty of $50,000 per incident of unauthorized disclosure, without prejudice to claims for actual damages proven to exceed such amount.

The Distributor shall be subject to a termination penalty equal to twelve (12) months of the average monthly Net Revenue earned in the preceding twenty-four (24) months if it unilaterally terminates this Agreement before the expiry date of 31/12/2027.

In the event of a material misrepresentation by the Seller that results in the Buyer overpaying, the Seller shall: (a) refund the excess payment within fifteen (15) business days; (b) pay an indemnity penalty of 200% of the excess amount; and (c) bear all transaction costs incurred by the Buyer.

Non-delivery of the agreed monthly quota for three consecutive months shall automatically trigger a shortage penalty equal to the difference between the contracted volume and actual volume multiplied by 150% of the prevailing market price, as published by the Vietnam Commodity Exchange.

Pursuant to Article 300 of the Commercial Law 2005, the total penalty for breach of contract shall not exceed 8% of the value of the breached contractual obligation; any agreed penalty in excess of this statutory cap shall be automatically reduced to 8%.

Should the Franchisee open a competing business within the restricted territory during or within twenty-four (24) months after termination of this Agreement, the Franchisee shall pay a covenant breach penalty of $200,000, plus the Franchisor's legal fees and costs of enforcement.

The penalty for premature withdrawal from the joint venture shall be calculated as follows: (i) forfeiture of all capital contributions made to date; (ii) payment of a withdrawal fee equal to 25% of the withdrawing Party's attributed enterprise value; and (iii) assumption of all liabilities attributable to the withdrawing Party.

In accordance with Article 418 of the Civil Code 2015, the agreed penalty for delayed performance is 0.05% of the delayed obligation value per day; this rate shall apply from the date performance was due, being 01/10/2025, until actual completion.

The Employer shall pay a wrongful termination penalty of thirty-six (36) months' gross salary to the Employee if this Agreement is terminated without cause and without the minimum notice period required under the Labor Code 2019.

Where the insurance premium is not paid within thirty (30) days of the due date, the Insurer shall impose a reinstatement penalty equal to 5% of the annual premium, and coverage shall be deemed suspended from the date of non-payment until the penalty and overdue premium are fully settled.

The Contractor's liability for defective works discovered during the defects liability period shall include: (i) the cost of rectification at no charge; (ii) a quality penalty of 3% of the contract price for each category of structural defect; and (iii) an extension of the warranty period by a duration equal to twice the rectification period.

Any attempt by the Assignor to assign its rights under this Agreement without prior written consent of the Assignee shall be void ab initio and shall trigger an unauthorized assignment penalty of $30,000, payable within ten (10) business days of discovery.

Violation of the minimum local content requirements set out in Decision No. 38/2020/QD-TTg shall subject the Investor to a local content deficiency penalty calculated at 2% of the shortfall value per quarter until full compliance is achieved.

If the Borrower's debt-service coverage ratio falls below 1.20x for two consecutive quarters, the Lender shall have the right to impose a covenant breach fee of 1% of the outstanding principal balance per quarter until the ratio is restored above 1.20x.

The exporter shall face a trade penalty comprising: (a) return of all export incentives and tax refunds previously granted; (b) a fine of 150% of the value of non-compliant goods; and (c) suspension from the preferential tariff program for a period of twenty-four (24) months, in accordance with the Law on Foreign Trade Management 2017.

Should the Operator's system uptime fall below 99.5% in any calendar month, the Operator shall credit the Client an amount equal to ten (10) times the pro-rata monthly fee for the period of unavailability, as a service-level breach penalty.

Repeated late submission of financial reports, defined as three or more late submissions within any twelve-month period, shall result in a reporting default penalty equal to 0.5% of the Facility Amount per occurrence, accumulating without cap until the default is cured.

The Seller shall pay a rescission penalty of 10% of the total purchase price to the Buyer in the event that the Seller exercises its right of rescission after the contract has been duly executed and the deposit has been received, pursuant to Article 423 of the Civil Code 2015.

The Construction Authority may impose an administrative stop-work order, and the Developer shall be liable for a delay propagation penalty of 0.02% of the total project investment per day for every day the stop-work order remains in effect due to the Developer's non-compliance with the Construction Law 2020.

Where the Guarantor fails to honor a valid demand under the guarantee within five (5) business days of receipt, the Guarantor shall, in addition to the guaranteed sum, pay a guarantee default penalty equal to the guaranteed sum plus interest at 15% per annum from the date of demand until full payment.

The lump-sum fine for anti-competitive conduct, including price-fixing or market-sharing arrangements prohibited under the Law on Competition 2018, shall be assessed at up to 10% of the total revenue of the infringing enterprise in the fiscal year preceding the infringement finding.

This Agreement is subject to, and shall be construed in accordance with, the laws of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam, including in particular the Civil Code 2015, the Commercial Law 2005, and all applicable sub-laws, regulations, and ministerial circulars.

The Parties agree that any dispute, controversy, or claim arising out of or in connection with this Agreement shall be finally settled by arbitration administered by the Vietnam International Arbitration Centre (VIAC) in accordance with its Rules of Arbitration, as supplemented by the Law on Commercial Arbitration 2010.

Environmental obligations under this Agreement shall be governed by the Law on Environmental Protection 2020 and Decree No. 08/2022/ND-CP guiding the implementation thereof, both as amended from time to time.

The security interest created under this Agreement shall be perfected by registration with the competent registration authority in accordance with Decree No. 99/2022/ND-CP on registration of security interests, and shall have priority over subsequently registered interests.

Corporate governance obligations of each Party that is a Vietnamese legal entity shall be fulfilled in accordance with the Law on Enterprises 2020 and the relevant Charter of each such entity; any conflict between this Agreement and the Charter shall be resolved in favor of this Agreement to the extent permitted by law.

The treatment of personal data collected in connection with this Agreement shall comply strictly with Decree No. 13/2023/ND-CP on personal data protection, and the Parties shall execute a separate Data Processing Agreement incorporating the requirements thereof by 30/06/2025.

All foreign exchange transactions and currency conversions required under this Agreement shall be conducted in compliance with Ordinance No. 06/2013/UBTVQH13 on Foreign Exchange and the guiding Decree No. 70/2014/ND-CP, as may be amended.

Employment terms and conditions shall be governed by the Labor Code 2019, Decree No. 145/2020/ND-CP on elaboration of the Labor Code, and all applicable collective bargaining agreements, which shall prevail over this contract in the event of inconsistency.

The issuance of bonds under this Agreement shall comply with Decree No. 65/2022/ND-CP as amended by Decree No. 08/2023/ND-CP on private placement of corporate bonds, and all relevant State Securities Commission regulations.

Intellectual property rights in the deliverables shall vest in the Client from the date of full payment, subject to the Law on Intellectual Property 2005 as amended by Law No. 07/2022/QH15, including provisions on copyright, industrial designs, and trademarks.

All construction activities shall be carried out in strict compliance with the Construction Law 2020, National Technical Regulations QCVN 06:2022/BXD, and any site-specific permits issued by the Department of Construction of Ho Chi Minh City.

The Parties acknowledge that this transaction may constitute a concentration of economic power and shall obtain prior approval from the National Competition Commission as required under Article 33 of the Law on Competition 2018 before completing the transaction.

Tax obligations of the Project Company shall be governed by the Law on Corporate Income Tax 2008 as amended and the Law on Value Added Tax 2008 as amended, together with all implementing decrees and circulars issued by the Ministry of Finance.

The transfer of land use rights contemplated under this Agreement is subject to the Land Law 2024, Decree No. 43/2014/ND-CP on land registration as amended, and all applicable provincial People's Committee regulations governing land transactions.

Maritime transport obligations shall be governed by the Vietnam Maritime Code 2015 and the International Convention for the Safety of Life at Sea (SOLAS) as ratified by Vietnam, and in case of conflict the Vietnam Maritime Code 2015 shall prevail.

Consumer protection obligations shall be fulfilled in accordance with the Law on Consumer Rights Protection 2023, and the Supplier shall maintain a complaint resolution mechanism meeting the standards prescribed under Decree No. 55/2024/ND-CP.

Cybersecurity measures implemented under this Agreement shall comply with the Law on Cybersecurity 2018, Decree No. 13/2023/ND-CP on personal data protection, and all technical standards issued by the Ministry of Public Security's cybersecurity agency.

Accounting records and financial statements shall be prepared in accordance with the Accounting Law 2015 and Vietnamese Accounting Standards (VAS) promulgated by the Ministry of Finance, with consolidation prepared under IFRS where required by the parent entity.

The insurance policies required under this Agreement shall be placed and maintained in compliance with the Law on Insurance Business 2022 and Decree No. 46/2023/ND-CP guiding the implementation thereof, with insurers licensed by the Ministry of Finance.

Anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing obligations shall be observed in accordance with the Law on Anti-Money Laundering 2022 and Decree No. 19/2023/ND-CP elaborating thereon, and the Parties shall conduct customer due diligence as required.

The import of goods under this Agreement shall be subject to the Law on Foreign Trade Management 2017, Decree No. 69/2018/ND-CP detailing import and export activities, and all relevant Ministry of Industry and Trade regulations, including applicable import licensing requirements.

Real estate transactions under this Agreement shall comply with the Law on Real Estate Business 2023, the Land Law 2024, and Circular No. 11/2024/TT-BXD on procedures for real estate registration, all as may be amended from time to time.

The collection, storage, and use of health and biometric data in connection with this Agreement shall be governed by the Law on Examination and Treatment 2023 and Decree No. 13/2023/ND-CP on personal data protection, and shall require explicit informed consent of each data subject.

Enforcement of this Agreement shall be subject to the Law on Enforcement of Civil Judgments 2008 as amended by Law No. 64/2014/QH13, and any enforcement action must be commenced within the limitation period prescribed by the Civil Code 2015.
